name: Raspberry Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line muffin tins with paper muffin liners.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together buttermilk, oil, and eggs until blended.
5. Add the dry ingredients and cereal to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Spoon 1/4 cup batter into each muffin cup.
7. Using a small spoon, make a well in the center of each muffin and fill it with 1 teaspoon jam.
8. Spoon the remaining batter over the jam.
9. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 25 minutes.
10. Turn muffins out onto cooling racks.
11. Allow to cool slightly before serving. Serve warm or at room temperature.
